subcodes.first_line: O ye servants and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! When the eternal bounties, like rays of effulgent light, shone forth upon the horizons, sanctified souls partook [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عباد و اماء رحمان فیض ابدی پرتو اشراق چون بر آفاق زد نفوس مقدسی بهره و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @thankfulness; gratitude, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
